keyspaces.description: Register each chat-service worker under /services/chat-service/ as a leased key (value host:port) with a TTL keepalive, so listeners discover the live worker set.

history.description: Register each chat-service worker under /services/chat-service/ as a leased key (value host:port) with a TTL keepalive, so listeners discover the live worker set.

listeners.description: Watch /services/chat-service/ and keep a live in-memory map of chat-service workers (worker id -> host:port), updated by pushed etcd events.

history.description: Watch /services/chat-service/ and keep a live in-memory map of chat-service workers (worker id -> host:port), updated by pushed etcd events.
